case_title: CACH, LLC VS. JENNY CHEN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-30-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
DECLARATION OF VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
POS;DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE; UNABLE TO SERVE THE DEFT THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, JENNY AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-09-2013
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE ON JENNY CHEN, AN INDIVIDUAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-30-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
